html:
CalmWarnWaxingSteadyWaningDawnNomagic

The Thulecite Medallion is an Ancient item. It requires 2 Nightmare Fuel, 2 Thulecite, and a Broken Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft. Like all items from the Ancient Tab, the Thulecite Medallion cannot be prototyped and Characters need to be near a Broken Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft it again.

The medallion changes colors to gauge the state of the Nightmare Cycle in the Ruins.

  • Calm Phase - The medallion will be tan.
  • Warning Phase - The medallion will be tan with red accents.
  • Nightmare Phase - The medallion will glow red. Nightmare Lights will spawn Shadow Creatures in this phase.

Examining the item at this time will provide further details regarding the current state of magical flux: becoming more magical, staying steady, or becoming less magical, referring to the start, middle, and end of the Nightmare Phase, respectively.

When outside the Ruins (including in the Caves), it will remain a constant red, with the character noting it's not working when it's examined.

All stages of a Thulecite Medallion.

Downloadable Content

In the Shipwrecked DLC, the Thulecite Medallion can be crafted while wearing a Brain of Thought, even when the player is not near an Ancient Pseudoscience Station.

DSTDSRoGSWHam

“All is well.”
–Wilson
“Looks normal to me.”
–Willow

–Wolfgang

–WX-78
“The levels of ectoplasmic residue seem to be at their lowest.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think it's off.”
–Woodie
“The heart of the city is still.”

“It's attuned to areas of psychic attack.”
–Wagstaff

“Everything's dandy.”
–Webber
“I can breathe easy.”

“It appears that all is well.”
–Warly

–Woodlegs
“WILBA 'TIS FEELINGS FINE”

–Wormwood
“A little too calm around here for my taste.”

“Nothing out of place here.”
–Winona
“No games to play today.”
–Wortox
“It seem safe.”

“Nothing's really happening.”
–Walter
“Things seem quiet for the time being.”
–Wanda
“Getting pretty magical around here.”
–Wilson

–Willow
“The bad light comes soon.”
–Wolfgang
“I can feel the prying eyes.”
–Wendy
“CYCLE MINIMUM HAS PASSED”
–WX-78
“There are low, but increasing levels of vapors containing ectoplasmic residue.”
–Wickerbottom

–Woodie

–Wigfrid
“Something's brewing.”

–Walani
“I feel some magic coming on!”
–Warly
“Somethin' feels off...”
–Woodlegs
“SOMETHING ROTTEN IN STATE OF WILBA HEAD”
–Wilba
“Something happening...”
–Wormwood
“Something's happening. I don't know what, but definitely something.”
–Wheeler
“I feel uneasy for some reason.”
–Winona
“I'm getting so excited!”
–Wortox
“Getting weird, florp...”
–Wurt
“Things are starting to get exciting!”
–Walter
“Oh no no no, don't you dare!”
–Wanda
“It's becoming more concentrated!”
–Wilson
“The fuel is coming to life!”
–Willow
“The bad light is here and getting stronger.”
–Wolfgang
“They approach.”
–Wendy
“INCREMENTAL INCREASE DETECTED”
–WX-78
“Levels of ectoplasmic residue seem to be increasing.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's vibrating!”
–Woodie
“The pulse is quickening.”
–Maxwell
“It's releasing a pulse. Almost as if it were alive!”
–Wagstaff
“The magic is heightening!”
–Wigfrid
“It's getting magickier!”
–Webber
“It's gaining strength!”
–Walani
“Magic hour!”
–Warly
“It be buildin'!”
–Woodlegs
“SOMETHING WICKED'D THIS WAY COMES!”
–Wilba
“Getting scary”
–Wormwood
“Things are getting... interesting.”
–Wheeler
“The air's all prickly.”
–Winona
“Ooo, it's picking up!”
–Wortox
“Something happening!”
–Wurt
“I think the monsters are coming!”
–Walter
“They're everywhere! I-I need to get out of here!!”
–Wanda
“It seems to be staying steady.”
–Wilson
“It's almost humming.”
–Willow
“I think bad light not get stronger.”
–Wolfgang
“They're all around!”
–Wendy
“LEVELS ARE HIGH AND MONOTONIC”
–WX-78
“The levels of ectoplasmic residue seem to be at their peak.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's going crazy!”
–Woodie
“The pulse is holding steady.”
–Maxwell
“Hohoo! I'm being hit with fluctuating psychic attacks!”
–Wagstaff
“The magic pöwer hölds steady.”
–Wigfrid
“Stable, for now.”
–Webber
“I think it's keeping consistent.”
–Walani
“Steady on.”
–Warly
“Th'nightmare's at its peak!”
–Woodlegs
“NOW IS WINTER OF WILBA DISCONTENT”
–Wilba
“Bad! Really bad!”
–Wormwood
“I wanted an adventure. This is definitely an adventure.”
–Wheeler
“It can't possibly get worse.”
–Winona
“Hyuyu! What fun!”
–Wortox
“Staying the same,.”
–Wurt
“Just a steady stream of monsters!”
–Walter
“Stay away from me!!”
–Wanda
“Feels like it's receding.”
–Wilson
“I think it's turning off.”
–Willow
“Bad light time is ending.”
–Wolfgang
“I think they're leaving.”
–Wendy
“THE CYCLE IS SUBSIDING”
–WX-78
“Levels of ectoplasmic residue are high but seem to be decreasing.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's settling down.”
–Woodie
“The pulse is waning.”
–Maxwell
“The pulses are coming less frequently now.”
–Wagstaff
“It's starting tö retreat!”
–Wigfrid
“Magic go down the hole.”
–Webber
“It's leaving...”
–Walani
“Subsiding.”
–Warly
“Me pegs feel it be dyin'.”
–Woodlegs
“THE VEIL 'TIS LIFTING”
–Wilba
“Getting better”
–Wormwood
“Things are getting back to normal. Whatever "normal" is.”
–Wheeler
“My head's starting to clear a bit.”
–Winona
“Aw, the chaos is dissipating.”
–Wortox
“It going away!”
–Wurt
“I think they're running out of energy...”
–Walter
“I just need to hold out a little longer--!”
–Wanda
“The nightmare is almost gone!”
–Wilson
“I guess it's nearly over.”
–Willow
“Good time is soon.”
–Wolfgang
“It's almost over.”
–Wendy
“LEVELS ARE LOW AND DIMINISHING”
–WX-78
“There is very little ectoplasmic residue vapor.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's nearly still.”
–Woodie
“It calms once more.”
–Maxwell
“The psychic attacks are over. What a shame!”
–Wagstaff
“Barely any magic remains.”
–Wigfrid
“Return to us, day!”
–Webber
“It's almost over...!”
–Walani
“This nightmare is almost over!”
–Warly
“It be slippin' away...”
–Woodlegs
“WHAT VISIONS HAS'T WILBA SEEN'D?”
–Wilba
“Whew”
–Wormwood
“Well, that was fun.”
–Wheeler
“I'm feeling much better.”
–Winona
“Playtime's almost over.”
–Wortox
“Over soon, over soon.”
–Wurt
“They're going away!”
–Walter
“It's almost over... I can do this!”
–Wanda
“There's no magic around here.”
–Wilson
“I don't think it's working.”
–Willow
“Is safe from bad light.”
–Wolfgang
“The presence has departed.”
–Wendy
“FLUCTUATIONS AT UNDETECTABLE LEVELS”
–WX-78
“There doesn't seem to be any ectoplasmic vapor around here.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think it's off.”
–Woodie
“The pulse has no influence here.”
–Maxwell
“I'll need to find a place where this works.”
–Wagstaff
“The magic slumbers far fröm here.”
–Wigfrid
“Not much magic here.”
–Webber
“I'm not getting anything.”
–Walani
“Magicless.”
–Warly
“Not a peep o'magic.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS NAUGHT PLACE FOR BAD MAGICINGS”
–Wilba
“Safe here”
–Wormwood
“Nothing going on here.”
–Wheeler
“Things seem pretty normal.”
–Winona
“A fun medallion for a more fun rapscallion!”
–Wortox
“Seem okay.”
–Wurt
“Aw, is it over?”
–Walter
“Looks like I'm free of any magical flapdoodle.”
–Wanda

Like all items from the Ancient Tab, the Thulecite Medallion cannot be prototyped and Characters need to be near a Broken Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft it again.

Calm Phase - The medallion will be tan.

The '''Thulecite Medallion''' is an [[Ancient]] [[item]]. It requires 2 [[Nightmare Fuel]], 2 [[Thulecite]], and a [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station|Broken Ancient Pseudoscience Station]] to craft. Like all items from the Ancient Tab, the Thulecite Medallion cannot be prototyped and [[Characters]] need to be near a Broken Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft it again.

The medallion changes colors to gauge the state of the [[Nightmare Cycle]] in the [[Ruins]].

* '''Calm Phase''' - The medallion will be tan.
* '''Warning Phase''' - The medallion will be tan with red accents.
* '''Nightmare Phase''' - The medallion will glow red. [[Nightmare Light]]s will spawn [[Shadow Creatures]] in this phase.

Examining the item at this time will provide further details regarding the current state of magical flux: ''becoming more magical'', ''staying steady'', or ''becoming less magical'', referring to the start, middle, and end of the Nightmare Phase, respectively.

When outside the Ruins (including in the [[Caves]]), it will remain a constant red, with the character noting it's not working when it's examined.

[[File:Thulecite_medallion_allstages.png|frame|center|All stages of a Thulecite Medallion.]]

== {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
In the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, the Thulecite Medallion can be crafted while wearing a [[Brain of Thought]], even when the player is not near an Ancient Pseudoscience Station.
